summary.headline: Yan Diomande profiles as a AM-W with strongest value in dribbles won /90, dribbles attempted /90.

summary.model_caveat: Role, similarity, and position labels are model outputs. Season average-position distribution is the primary spatial source; heatmaps are visual/action-density layers only.
